backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining the backend for a habit tracker, with CRUD operations for habits and log entries, streak calculation, and theme storage using Map and List data structures.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (built-in habit types, custom habit builder, streak/heatmap tracking, animated progress rings) to their corresponding source files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document providing one-line summaries of key frontend source files including App.tsx, Analytics, Settings, HabitDetail pages, and the Layout component.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme tokens (colors, radius, chart colors, sidebar) used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA titled 'Universal Habit Tracker', mounting the app at #root and loading the main.tsx module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with four routes (Dashboard, Analytics, HabitDetail, Settings) wrapped in a ThemeProvider.
frontend/src/components/CircularProgress: SVG-based animated circular progress ring component that displays a percentage or checkmark, with color transitions on completion and a drop-shadow glow effect.
frontend/src/components/ColorPicker.tsx: Color picker component rendering preset color swatches and a custom color input, highlighting the currently selected color with a ring.
frontend/src/components/CustomHabitBuild: Modal dialog component with tabs for selecting built-in habit presets or building a fully custom habit (name, unit, icon, color, target, type, frequency) and submitting via the createHabit mutation.
frontend/src/components/CustomThemeBuild: A dialog component that lets users build a custom theme by picking primary, background, and accent colors along with card style and border radius options, with a live preview and save functionality.
A dialog component for editing an existing habit's name, unit, target, frequency, icon, and color, using the useUpdateHabit mutation to persist changes.
frontend/src/components/GoalCompletionAn: A confetti particle animation component that displays colorful particles and a celebration emoji when a habit goal is completed, auto-dismissing after ~1.4 seconds.
frontend/src/components/HabitCard.tsx: A card component displaying a single habit's progress (circular progress, streaks, emoji icon) with a dropdown menu for editing, deleting, or viewing detailed stats.
frontend/src/components/HabitTypeSelecto: A grid selector component that displays built-in habit templates, allowing users to pick a preset habit configuration when creating a new habit.
A GitHub-style heatmap calendar component that visualizes 365 days of habit log entries with color intensity based on progress toward a daily target.
frontend/src/components/IconPicker.tsx: A grid picker component that displays all available emoji icons and lets users select one for a habit, highlighting the currently selected icon.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: The root layout component that renders the navigation sidebar/tab bar, a main content area via React Router's Outlet, and a toast notification provider.
frontend/src/components/LogEntryInput.ts: An input component that handles logging habit entries for numeric (slider/input), boolean (checkbox), and todo-list habit types, triggering a goal completion animation when the target is met.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Renders a fixed desktop sidebar and mobile bottom tab bar with links to Dashboard, Analytics, and Settings routes, highlighting the active route.
frontend/src/components/ThemePicker.tsx: Displays a grid of selectable theme cards with color swatches, allowing the user to switch the app theme via ThemeContext.
frontend/src/context/ThemeContext.tsx: Provides a React context for managing the current theme, persisting it to the backend actor, applying CSS theme classes to the document body, and supporting custom themes.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity authentication via AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status through a React context provider and hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for CRUD operations on habits and log entries, wrapping backend actor calls with caching and cache invalidation logic.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining Tailwind base layers, CSS custom properties for light/dark themes and multiple named theme classes (glass, neon, nature, retro) using OKLCH color values.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/Analytics.tsx: Analytics page displaying last-30-days stats (goal rate, avg daily, days active, total logged) and line/bar charts for a selected habit, with a habit selector dropdown and loading/empty states.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page that lists all habits in a responsive grid with loading skeletons, an empty onboarding state, and a button to open the CustomHabitBuilder modal.
frontend/src/pages/HabitDetail.tsx: Detail page for a single habit showing today's circular progress, streak stats, a heatmap calendar, and last-30-days entries, fetched by habit ID from the route params.
frontend/src/pages/Settings.tsx: Settings page providing a theme picker, a button to open the CustomThemeBuilder modal, and an about section with app info and attribution.
frontend/src/themes/themeDefinitions.ts: Defines the ThemeDefinition interface and exports an array of five built-in themes (Minimal, Glassmorphism, Neon Dark, Nature, Retro) with colors, card style, border radius, and preview swatches.
frontend/src/types/habit.ts: Defines the BuiltInHabitConfig interface, an array of eight preset habits (water, calories, exercise, etc.), emoji/color palettes, and TodoTask helpers for serializing/parsing checklist values.
frontend/src/utils/analyticsCalculator.t: Utility functions that transform log entries into daily and weekly data point arrays for charting, and calculate the goal completion rate percentage over a given date range.
frontend/src/utils/streakCalculator.ts: Provides utility functions to calculate current and longest habit streaks from log entries, and to generate nanosecond-precision BigInt timestamps for today and date ranges.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens (primary, sidebar, chart, etc.), border radius variables, accordion keyframes, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing the universal habit tracker app's architecture, existing features (built-in log types, custom log builder, streaks, analytics, themes), known issues, and image requirements.
